message:
fix(core): eliminate condvar TOCTOU race, stack overflow guard, and unify test serialization

Three categories of concurrency fixes:

1. Condvar TOCTOU race (cond.rs): The last-waiter check used a separate
   load after fetch_sub, creating a window where another thread could
   decrement between the two operations. Fix: use the return value of
   fetch_sub directly (prev_waiters == 1) in both condvar_wait and
   condvar_timedwait.

2. Stack allocation overflow (thread.rs): Guard page + stack size
   addition could overflow on extreme inputs. Fix: use checked_add
   with ENOMEM fallback instead of bare GUARD_PAGE_SIZE + stack_size.

3. Test serialization unification (thread.rs, tls.rs, rcu/mod.rs,
   pthread_tsd_test.rs, stdlib_abi_test.rs): Previously, TLS tests
   used a local TEST_LOCK mutex while thread tests had no serialization,
   causing intermittent failures when RCU global state was accessed
   concurrently. Fix: introduce rcu_test_global_lock() in rcu/mod.rs
   as the single shared mutex, use it in all 12 thread tests via
   lock_rcu_test_state() guard, replace TLS local lock with it, add
   Once::call_once for native threading init in pthread_tsd_test, and
   add Mutex guard to getopt tests (which use global optind state).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
